name: Temperature conversions C/F/K
task: Create /tmp/eval_temp/temp.py with four functions: c_to_f(c), c_to_k(c), f_to_c(f), k_to_c(k). Standard formulas (F = C*9/5+32; K = C+273.15).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_temp/temp.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); assert abs(mod.c_to_f(0) - 32) < 1e-9; assert abs(mod.c_to_f(100) - 212) < 1e-9; assert abs(mod.c_to_k(0) - 273.15) < 1e-9; assert abs(mod.f_to_c(212) - 100) < 1e-9; assert abs(mod.k_to_c(273.15)) < 1e-9; print('OK')
